issues.detail: The skill references a vendor-specific file path (.claude/product-marketing-context.md), limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: meditation-app-referral-program
scenarios.rationale: Treatment maps the referral loop (trigger → share → convert → reward) with specific aha/milestone trigger moments, picks a double-sided incentive sized against LTV/CAC, prescribes in-product one-click sharing, and adds fraud-prevention rules and a launch email sequence from day one; baseline proposes a generic 'give $10 to each side' program without trigger placement, fraud rules, or launch promotion.

scenarios.name: youtube-affiliate-program
scenarios.rationale: Treatment recommends recurring commissions (justified by LTV) with a tiered structure, recruitment of mid-tier creators with exclusive offers, disclosure/anti-fraud rules, and tracking via affiliate tooling with last-click attribution; baseline suggests a flat one-time payout with no tiers, no anti-fraud controls, and no recruitment strategy.
